nation: Fond du Lac Denesuline First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Fond du Lac First Nation Development Limited Partnership (99.9%), Fond du Lac First Nation (2008) Development Corporation (100%), Waterfound Development Corp (33.33%), and Waterfound Development Limited Partnership (33.33%). Three entities fully consolidated: Fond du Lac Mineral Resources Inc, Fond du Lac Power Corporation, Fond du Lac Hydro Inc. Multiple capital projects underway including WTP expansion, school renovations, environmental remediation, subdivision expansion.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to omission of budget information required under PSAS. Financial statements are restated for 2022 comparative figures. The Fond du Lac Specific Claim Trust is excluded from consolidation as it is administered and controlled by Trustees. Deferred revenue treatment drives large swings in reported revenue between years. Large ISC accounts receivable of $9.66M at year-end representing capital project funding. Equity in GBEs of $33.6M is significant portion of financial assets. CMHC mortgages included in long-term debt total.
